key.name: incognito
key.summary: Do not record clipboard history

key.name: disable-gda-warning
key.summary: Disable Gda warning

key.name: disable-hljs-dialog
key.summary: Disable the hljs dialog from showing up when launching preferences if hljs is not installed

key.name: in-memory-database
key.summary: Store clipboard history in memory instead of on disk (Deprecated)

key.name: database-backend
key.summary: Selects which backend to use for the clipboard database.

key.name: database-location
key.summary: Path to the database. When empty defaults to {XDG_DATA_HOME}/{EXTENSION UUID}/clipboard.{db,json} depending on the backend.

key.name: clipboard-history
key.summary: Choose what to do with your clipboard history when you restart, log out, or shut down your system

key.name: history-length
key.summary: Number of unpinned items to keep in the clipboard history

key.name: history-time
key.summary: Number of minutes to keep unpinned items in the clipboard history. Set to 0 to disable the time limit

key.name: remember-search
key.summary: Remember the last search

key.name: exclude-pinned
key.summary: Pinned items appear only when searching for pinned items

key.name: exclude-tagged
key.summary: Tagged items appear only when searching for tagged items

key.name: protect-pinned
key.summary: Prevents pinned clipboard items from being deleted

key.name: protect-tagged
key.summary: Prevents tagged clipboard items from being deleted

key.name: paste-on-copy
key.summary: Automatically paste clipboard items when selected from clipboard history (Deprecated)

key.name: sync-primary
key.summary: Also copy clipboard items to the primary clipboard

key.name: update-date-on-copy
key.summary: Update the copied date of clipboard items when selected from clipboard history

key.name: indicator-display
key.summary: Choose how the clipboard indicator appears in the top panel

key.name: show-indicator
key.summary: Show the clipboard icon in the indicator (Deprecated)

key.name: show-content-indicator
key.summary: Show the current clipboard content in the indicator (Deprecated)

key.name: wiggle-indicator
key.summary: Wiggle the indicator when a clipboard item is copied

key.name: send-notification
key.summary: Send a notification when a clipboard item is copied

key.name: sound
key.summary: Sound to play when a clipboard item is copied

key.name: volume
key.summary: Volume of the sound as a decibel offset

key.name: wmclass-exclusions
key.summary: Apps that will be excluded from clipboard history

key.name: show-at-pointer
key.summary: Show the clipboard dialog at the pointer position

key.name: show-at-cursor
key.summary: Show the clipboard dialog at the text cursor position

key.name: clipboard-orientation
key.summary: Orientation of the clipboard dialog

key.name: clipboard-position-vertical
key.summary: Vertical position of the clipboard dialog

key.name: clipboard-position-horizontal
key.summary: Horizontal position of the clipboard dialog

key.name: clipboard-size
key.summary: Width or height of the clipboard dialog depending on the orientation

key.name: clipboard-margin-top
key.summary: Top margin of the clipboard dialog

key.name: clipboard-margin-right
key.summary: Right margin of the clipboard dialog

key.name: clipboard-margin-bottom
key.summary: Bottom margin of the clipboard dialog

key.name: clipboard-margin-left
key.summary: Left margin of the clipboard dialog

key.name: auto-hide-search
key.summary: Automatically hide the search bar when not focused

key.name: show-scrollbar
key.summary: Show a scrollbar when items overflow

key.name: item-width
key.summary: Width of a clipboard item

key.name: item-height
key.summary: Height of a clipboard item

key.name: dynamic-item-height
key.summary: Dynamically adjust the height of the clipboard items based on their content

key.name: tab-width
key.summary: Tab width

key.name: show-header
key.summary: Show the header of a clipboard item

key.name: header-controls-visibility
key.summary: Visibility of the header controls of a clipboard item

key.name: show-item-title
key.summary: Show the title of a clipboard item

key.name: open-clipboard-dialog-shortcut
key.summary: Shortcut to open the clipboard dialog

key.name: toggle-incognito-mode-shortcut
key.summary: Shortcut to toggle incognito mode

key.name: open-clipboard-dialog-behavior
key.summary: Behavior of the open clipboard dialog shortcut when the dialog is open/closed.

key.name: pin-item-shortcut
key.summary: Shortcut to pin a clipboard item

key.name: delete-item-shortcut
key.summary: Shortcut to delete a clipboard item

key.name: edit-item-shortcut
key.summary: Shortcut to edit a clipboard item

key.name: edit-title-shortcut
key.summary: Shortcut to edit the title of a clipboard item

key.name: open-menu-shortcut
key.summary: Shortcut to open the menu of a clipboard item

key.name: middle-click-action
key.summary: Action to perform when the middle mouse button is clicked

key.name: swap-copy-shortcut
key.summary: Swaps copy and paste shortcuts

key.name: swap-scroll-shortcut
key.summary: Swaps scroll shortcuts of cycling item types and item tags
